claim: We hypothesize that compound X reduces inflammatory markers by at least 30% in the treatment arm.
rationale: Methods and results describe the compound and measured inflammation outcomes.

claim: Training was run on eight NVIDIA A100 GPUs with a batch size of 64 for 72 hours.
rationale: Hardware and duration are stated in the methodology section.

claim: Future work will extend the model to multilingual corpora and release weights under an open license.
rationale: Key sections mention direction but not binding commitments.

claim: The baseline achieved 92.3% accuracy on the development set.
rationale: Reported dev accuracy in the excerpt is 89.1%, not 92.3%.
